raw_text: sofia montagut bel https: //www.linkedin.com/in/sofia-montagut-bel-743623259 sofiamontagut9 @gmail.com 02/02/2001 spanish +34691384790 education universitat politécnica de catalunya (upc eetac) [sep. 2019-ongoing] barcelona, spain bsc in aerospace systems engineering projects - digital sanitization system [2024] led a collaborative project with damm brewery to enhance beer quality in draft systems. applied automation and data management for effective solutions, addressing flavor perception challenges. - airport design [2023] management and feasibility study for the implementation of an airfield in a mountainous region, with a focus on the air side. - air traffic management [2022] development of a matlab algorithm to analyze various air traffic management methods, comparing factors such as delays, fuel consumption, and sustainability. - fluid mechanics [2022] using matlab and solidworks, a simulation was conducted to analyze the airflow around airfoils with three different chambers. the computation included the pressure field, velocity, stream function, and the graphical representation of their 2d behavior. universitat rovira i virgili (urv) [sept. 2017 - june 2019] tarragona, spain advanced math and physics course "talent jove" professional experience summer full-time positions to support my studies: tourism info., fcb official store, swimsuit store, camping sanguli. [june 2018 ongoing] tarragona, spain e strive to provide distinct customer experience, always working face-to-face with the public, recognizing the trade-off among complex operations, the effect of those on the workforce, and the impact on the customer. part time internship as data analyst (i+d+i) at upbizor [september 2023 december 2023] barcelona, spain languages . catalan & spanish (native) e english (fluent c1 level ielts band score 7.5) . french & italian (basic) skills - programming: winlqsim, matlab, proteus, ch, python, arduino. - software: solidworks, microsoft office. additional experiences and interests erasmus in torino, italy for the final degree thesis [february 2024- july 2024] - cad design (solidworks), cfd aerodynamic analysis (astrid), and mission simulation of a supersonic aircraft (redesign of nasa's x-59 low-boom aircraft) e volunteering: coordinator of the student residence [2020-2022]. - maintenance of social networks, creation of banners and graphic content & development of different kinds of activities for entertainment and to enhance creativity and autonomy. e premonitory course & private tutor: maths and physics to pre-university students. e magda simó models: initiation course + professional stewardess and model. [2015-2019]
